global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with product images and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a new collection with a discount and free shipping.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire banner, providing a vibrant and eye-catching base.

elements.label: ZenDrop logo
elements.description: The logo features the word 'ZenDrop' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the banner.

elements.label: Three product images
elements.description: Three rectangular product images are displayed in a row, each with a simple outline and a light blue fill.

elements.label: Additional product image
elements.description: A larger rectangular product image is positioned next to the three smaller images, also outlined and filled with light blue.

elements.label: Another product image
elements.description: Another rectangular product image, similar in style to the others, is placed adjacent to the larger image.

elements.label: Free shipping text
elements.description: The text 'Free shipping over $25' is displayed in a clear, readable font, positioned below the main headline.

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A prominent button labeled 'Get offer' is displayed in a contrasting color, inviting user interaction.
elements.text_content: New collection drop Free shipping over $25 30% Get offer

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The headline 'New collection drop' is prominently displayed in a large, bold font, capturing attention.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, ZenDrop logo, new collection drop.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline, product images in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: ZenDrop, New collection drop, Free shipping over $25, -30%, Get offer
